content: Just thinking about some of the changes recently... I'm wondering if I should update my packages so they download the roc nightly each day and run all the tests. It's not a great experience if people find issues when they go to use a new nightly... I guess this would alert me to problems early and I would be to fix them and make a new release.
One minor suggestion, start with checking if the nightly was uploaded in the last 24 hours. I don't upload a new one every day.
